glosses.en: overnight stay; accommodation for the night

sentences.target: Ich suche eine günstige Übernachtung in Berlin.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈɡʏnstɪgə ˌyːbɐˈnaxtʊŋ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/

translations.de: Ich suche eine günstige Übernachtung in Berlin.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈɡʏnstɪgə ˌyːbɐˈnaxtʊŋ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/
translations.en: I'm looking for an affordable overnight stay in Berlin.
translations.fr: Je cherche un hébergement abordable à Berlin.
translations.it: Cerco un alloggio economico a Berlino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在柏林找实惠的住宿。
translations.yue: 我喺柏林搵平啲嘅住宿。
translations.pt: Estou procurando hospedagem econômica em Berlim.
translations.he: אני מחפש לינה במחיר סביר בברלין.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm chỗ ở giá rẻ ở Berlin.
translations.ar: أبحث عن إقامة بسعر مناسب في برلين.
translations.nl: Ik zoek betaalbare accommodatie in Berlijn.
translations.hi: मैं बर्लिन में सस्ती ठहरने की जगह तलाश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter rimelig overnatting i Berlin.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari penginapan yang terjangkau di Berlin.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett prisvärt boende i Berlin.
translations.cs: Hledám cenově dostupné ubytování v Berlíně.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter billig overnatning i Berlin.
translations.ja: ベルリンで手頃な宿泊先を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; selects a direct object (‘Übernachtung’).
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the noun phrase headed by ‘Übernachtung’.
Attributive adjective, inflected feminine accusative singular; modifies ‘Übernachtung’.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP in accusative singular.
Preposition heading the locative PP ‘in Berlin’; modifies the NP, specifying location.
Proper noun; object of the preposition ‘in’; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Die Übernachtung kostet pro Person fünfzig Euro.
sentences.reading: /diː ˌyːbɐˈnaxtʊŋ ˈkɔstɛt pʁoː pɛʁˈzoːn ˈfʏnftsɪç ˈɔɪ̯ʁo/

translations.de: Die Übernachtung kostet pro Person fünfzig Euro.
translations.ipa: /diː ˌyːbɐˈnaxtʊŋ ˈkɔstɛt pʁoː pɛʁˈzoːn ˈfʏnftsɪç ˈɔɪ̯ʁo/
translations.en: The overnight stay costs fifty euros per person.
translations.es: La noche cuesta cincuenta euros por persona.
translations.fr: La nuit coûte cinquante euros par personne.
translations.it: La notte costa cinquanta euro a persona.
translations.yue: 每人每晚收費五十歐元。
translations.pt: A diária custa cinquenta euros por pessoa.
translations.vi: Một đêm có giá 50 euro mỗi người.
translations.nl: De overnachting kost vijftig euro per persoon.
translations.hu: Az egy éjszaka ára személyenként ötven euró.
translations.hi: एक रात का खर्च प्रति व्यक्ति पचास यूरो है.
translations.el: Η διανυκτέρευση κοστίζει πενήντα ευρώ το άτομο.
translations.nb: Overnattingen koster femti euro per person.
translations.id: Biaya menginap adalah lima puluh euro per orang.
translations.sv: Övernattningen kostar femtio euro per person.
translations.ro: Cazarea costă cincizeci de euro pe persoană.
translations.cs: Nocleh stojí padesát eur za osobu.
translations.ja: 宿泊は一人あたり50ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP in nominative singular.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; predicate expressing price.
Preposition forming the rate PP ‘pro Person’; attaches as a measure modifier (‘per person’).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘pro’; specifies the unit of the rate.
Cardinal numeral; numeric modifier of ‘Euro’ indicating the amount.
Currency noun; head of the measure NP; complements the verb as price expression.

sentences.target: Wir haben die Übernachtung schon online gebucht.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən diː ˌyːbɐˈnaxtʊŋ ʃoːn ˈɔnlaɪ̯n ɡəˈbuːxt/

translations.de: Wir haben die Übernachtung schon online gebucht.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən diː ˌyːbɐˈnaxtʊŋ ʃoːn ˈɔnlaɪ̯n ɡəˈbuːxt/
translations.en: We already booked the overnight stay online.
translations.es: Ya hemos reservado el alojamiento en línea.
translations.fr: Nous avons déjà réservé l'hébergement en ligne.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们已经在网上把住宿订好了。
translations.yue: 我哋已經喺網上訂好咗住宿。
translations.pt: Nós já reservamos a hospedagem online.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã đặt chỗ trực tuyến rồi.
translations.ar: لقد حجزنا الإقامة عبر الإنترنت بالفعل.
translations.nl: We hebben de overnachting al online geboekt.
translations.hi: हमने ठहरने की बुकिंग ऑनलाइन पहले ही कर ली है.
translations.el: Έχουμε ήδη κλείσει τη διαμονή στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Vi har allerede bestilt overnattingen på nettet.
translations.id: Kami sudah memesan penginapan secara online.
translations.sv: Vi har redan bokat boendet på nätet.
translations.cs: Už jsme si nocleh zarezervovali přes internet.
translations.da: Vi har allerede booket overnatningen på nettet.
translations.ja: もうオンラインで宿泊を予約しました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary, 1st person plural present indicative; forms perfect with the participle ‘gebucht’.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the object NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP in accusative; object of ‘gebucht’.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase, indicating prior completion.
Adverb of manner; specifies the medium/method of booking.
Past participle serving as the main lexical verb in a perfect construction with auxiliary ‘haben’.

sentences.target: Es gibt eine Übernachtung mit Frühstück.

translations.de: Es gibt eine Übernachtung mit Frühstück.
translations.en: There is an overnight stay with breakfast.
translations.fr: Il y a un hébergement avec petit-déjeuner.
translations.pt: Há hospedagem com café da manhã.
translations.vi: Có chỗ ở kèm bữa sáng.
translations.hi: नाश्ते सहित ठहरने की सुविधा है.
translations.ja: 朝食付きの宿泊があります。

tokens.explanation: Expletive pronoun; impersonal subject in an existential construction.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; existential ‘es gibt’ introducing the existence of an entity.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the object NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the NP functioning as the accusative object of ‘gibt’.
Preposition heading the PP ‘mit Frühstück’; modifies the NP, specifying inclusion/feature.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘mit’; denotes what is included.
